title: Allow importing multi-file GGUF models
summary:
### What is the issue?

Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.

title: [Epic] Improve Speech-to-Text Speed & Quality — Local LLMs, Streaming, Provider Evaluation
summary:
## Overview

This is the top-level epic for improving speech-to-text (STT) performance in Freely. The primary goal is to **dramatically reduce STT latency** — the time between the user finishing speaking and the transcript appearing.

## Current Implementation Analysis

title: [PR] Add multi-provider AI support: OpenWebUI, LibreChat, Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic
summary:
The chat system was hardcoded to Groq. This adds first-class support for self-hosted platforms (OpenWebUI, LibreChat, Ollama) and cloud providers (OpenAI, Anthropic) alongside the existing Groq integration.
